A '''battle''' took place in [[5 ABY/Legends|5.5 ABY]], when a desperate [[Sander Delvardus]], leader of the [[Eriadu Authority]], tried to capture the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Sullust/Legends|Sullust]] to stop the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] expansion in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="TEA" />

Delvardus was roundly defeated by the [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]] [[Sien Sovv]] who launched a counterattack campaign for the control of territories of the [[Eriadu Authority]].<ref name="TEA" />
